title: Mock Test 53 - Inversion (Negative Adverb Inversion)
description: Inversion নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Never, Hardly, Scarcely, No sooner, Not only, Rarely, Seldom, Only after, Not until, Only when — এদের inversion structure।

questions.question: Inversion কী?
options: 'বাক্যের normal word order (Subject + Verb) বিপরীত করে Auxiliary + Subject + Main Verb'
questions.explanation: Inversion = normal word order reversed when negative adverb starts a sentence.

questions.question: Inversion সাধারণত কোথায় হয়?
options: Negative adverb দিয়ে sentence শুরু করলে
questions.explanation: Negative adverbs (Never, Rarely, Hardly) দিয়ে শুরু করলে inversion হয়।

questions.question: 'Never have I seen such beauty.' — এখানে inversion কেন?
options: 'Never' negative adverb, তাই Auxiliary (have) Subject (I)-এর আগে চলে এসেছে
questions.explanation: 'Never' negative adverb → Auxiliary (have) comes before Subject (I).

questions.question: 'No sooner ___ the train than it started raining.'
questions.explanation: 'No sooner' → inversion: 'had + subject + V3'।

questions.question: 'Not until I saw her ___ I realize my mistake.'
questions.explanation: 'Not until' + clause + inversion in main clause। 'did I realize'।

questions.question: 'Only after ___ did I understand.'
questions.explanation: 'Only after' + clause (no inversion) + inverted main clause।

questions.question: 'Hardly had I arrived ___ it started raining.'
questions.explanation: 'Hardly... when...' — fixed pair।

questions.question: 'Scarcely ___ we sat down when the phone rang.'
questions.explanation: 'Scarcely' + had + subject ('Scarcely had we sat down')।

questions.question: 'Rarely ___ such a talented player.'
questions.explanation: 'Rarely' → Inversion: 'have I seen'।

questions.question: 'Not only did he pass, but he ___ top.'
questions.explanation: 'Not only + inversion + but + normal clause'।

questions.question: Error: 'Never I have seen such a mess.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Never' → inversion: 'Never have I seen' হবে।

questions.question: Error: 'No sooner we left than it rained.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'No sooner' → inversion: 'No sooner had we left' হবে।

questions.question: Error: 'Only after I finished, I realized my mistake.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Only after...' → main clause-এ inversion: 'did I realize'।

questions.question: Error: 'Hardly I had arrived when it started raining.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Hardly' → inversion: 'Hardly had I arrived' হবে।

questions.question: Fill: 'Seldom ___ (I/see) such dedication.'
questions.explanation: 'Seldom' → inversion: 'have I seen'।

questions.question: Fill: 'Not until I read the letter ___ (I/understand) the truth.'
questions.explanation: 'Not until...' + inverted main clause: 'did I understand'।

questions.question: Fill: 'Only by working hard ___ (you/succeed).'
questions.explanation: 'Only by + Ving' → inversion in main: 'will you succeed'।

questions.question: Fill: 'No sooner had I gone to bed ___ the phone rang.'
questions.explanation: 'No sooner... than...' — fixed pair।

questions.question: অনুবাদ (Inversion): 'আমি কখনো এত সুন্দর দৃশ্য দেখিনি।'
options: Never I have seen such a beautiful view.
Never have I seen such a beautiful view.
Never I saw such beautiful view.
Never saw I such beautiful view.
questions.explanation: 'Never' → inversion: 'Never have I seen'।

questions.question: অনুবাদ (Inversion): 'কঠোর পরিশ্রম করলেই তুমি সফল হবে।'
options: Only by working hard you will succeed.
Only by working hard will you succeed.
questions.explanation: 'Only by' + Ving → inversion: 'will you succeed'।
